Serialized Form

  • Package com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception

    • Class com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception.GeminiApiException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • errorCode

          int errorCode
          Returns the HTTP error code returned by the Gemini API.

        • errorMessage

          String errorMessage
          Returns the error message returned by the Gemini API.

    • Class com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception.GeminiPermissionDeniedException extends GeminiApiException implements Serializable

    • Class com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception.GeminiResourceExhaustedException extends GeminiApiException implements Serializable

    • Class com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception.GeminiUnavailableException extends GeminiApiException implements Serializable
